title: LUDIARS App Manifest
description: Manifest a LUDIARS app exposes to a Hub Shell (see spec/feature/hub-shell.md). Phase 0 stub — fields may change before Phase 1 starts.

id.description: Short immutable identifier. Used in URLs and Hub Shell internals.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the Hub Shell nav.

description.description: One-line role description displayed under the app name in the tab nav (e.g. 'ナレッジ管理'). Required; kept short to fit the tab layout. See hub-shell.md §4.2.

icon.description: Emoji or URL to SVG/PNG. URL is resolved relative to the manifest if a base is known.

entry.description: How the Hub Shell should mount this app's UI.

tag.description: Custom element tag (must contain a hyphen per HTML spec).

url.description: URL to the JS module that registers the custom element.
URL to an ESM module whose default export is { mount(el, ctx), unmount(el) }.

capabilities.description: Capabilities the app requests from the Hub Shell. Phase 1 will define each.

dataChannels.description: Cross-app data channels this app participates in (see hub-shell.md §8). Phase 0 only declares 'task'; more channels added later.

role.description: provider = authoritative store; consumer = reads/writes via shell mediation; both = bidirectional sync.

path.description: URL prefix in the Hub Shell's URL space.

default.description: If true, navigating to /apps/<id> resolves to this route.
